---
title: "Dimensionality reduction"
subtitle: "Principal component analysis"
date: "Oct 23, 2026"
date-format: long
---

PCA as variance maximization and as a reconstruction problem; the SVD; choosing the number of components; PCR as a regression follow-up.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR §6.3

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [slides_clean](slides_clean.pdf) | [slides_annotated](slides_annotated.pdf)

**Code:** [class9_lab1.Rmd](code/class9_lab1.Rmd) [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)

**Supplementary readings:** [Novembre et al. (2008)](readings/Novembre et al. (2008).pdf) [Zhang and Castelló  (2017)](readings/Zhang and Castelló  (2017).pdf)
